install.windows: $target = Join-Path '{toolsRoot}' 'engram'; if (-not (Test-Path $target)) { git clone https://github.com/Gentleman-Programming/engram.git $target }; Set-Location $target; go install ./cmd/engram
install.linux: $target = Join-Path '{toolsRoot}' 'engram'; if (-not (Test-Path $target)) { git clone https://github.com/Gentleman-Programming/engram.git $target }; Set-Location $target; go install ./cmd/engram
install.macos: $target = Join-Path '{toolsRoot}' 'engram'; if (-not (Test-Path $target)) { git clone https://github.com/Gentleman-Programming/engram.git $target }; Set-Location $target; go install ./cmd/engram

install.windows: $target = Join-Path '{toolsRoot}' 'gentleman-guardian-angel'; if (-not (Test-Path $target)) { git clone https://github.com/Gentleman-Programming/gentleman-guardian-angel.git $target }; Set-Location $target; bash ./install.sh
install.linux: $target = Join-Path '{toolsRoot}' 'gentleman-guardian-angel'; if (-not (Test-Path $target)) { git clone https://github.com/Gentleman-Programming/gentleman-guardian-angel.git $target }; Set-Location $target; bash ./install.sh
install.macos: $target = Join-Path '{toolsRoot}' 'gentleman-guardian-angel'; if (-not (Test-Path $target)) { git clone https://github.com/Gentleman-Programming/gentleman-guardian-angel.git $target }; Set-Location $target; bash ./install.sh

install.windows: $target = Join-Path '{toolsRoot}' 'Gentleman-Skills'; if (-not (Test-Path $target)) { git clone https://github.com/Gentleman-Programming/Gentleman-Skills.git $target } else { Set-Location $target; git pull --ff-only }
install.linux: $target = Join-Path '{toolsRoot}' 'Gentleman-Skills'; if (-not (Test-Path $target)) { git clone https://github.com/Gentleman-Programming/Gentleman-Skills.git $target } else { Set-Location $target; git pull --ff-only }
install.macos: $target = Join-Path '{toolsRoot}' 'Gentleman-Skills'; if (-not (Test-Path $target)) { git clone https://github.com/Gentleman-Programming/Gentleman-Skills.git $target } else { Set-Location $target; git pull --ff-only }
